'''Blimph''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Blimph system/Legends|Blimph system]]. One of its [[Moon/Legends|moons]] was [[Tertiary Moon of Blimph|Blimph 3]], which was strategically important to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] due to trading with the [[Jokhalli]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Scoundrel's Wages]]'' {{1stm}}
